case_title: FOUNTAS-DUNIA, ELIZABETH VS UOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. (MASOUD ATTAR, AGENT)

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO MASOUD ATTAR AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR UOMO EUTOPEAN MENSWEAR INC RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOUNTAS-DUNIA, ELIZABETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. (MASOUD ATTAR, AGENT) DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. THE PLAINTIFF STILL HAS A STORE CREDIT AT DEFENDANT'S STORE FOR $1190.79, WHICH CAN BE APPLIED TO ANY ITEM IN DEFENDANT'S STORE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,220.79 FILED BY FOUNTAS-DUNIA, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT UOMO EUROPEAN MENSWEAR, INC. (MASOUD ATTAR, AGENT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
